zh.lifeSummary: 當Colswein of Lincoln於大約1040年出生在英國林可爾史爾布拉特萊比時，他的父親Thorold le Danois de Lincoln1歲，母親Edith Malet-2歲。他和Muriel de Chappell至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1110年2月在英國多瑟特維姆斯享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lincoln
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the name of the city of Lincoln. This is found in the 7th century as Lindum colonia, probably from an Old Welsh word meaning ‘lake’ (compare modern Welsh llyn) + the Latin defining term colonia ‘colony, settlement’. As a given name it was in use in the United States in the 18th century. Rising in popularity in the 19th century, it has no doubt sometimes been bestowed in honour of Abraham Lincoln ( 1809–65 ), 16th president of the United States, who led the Union to victory in the Civil War and enforced the emancipation of slaves.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Colswein of Lincoln was born about 1040, in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thorold le Danois de Lincoln, was 1 and his mother, Edith Malet, was -2. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Muriel de Chappell. He died in February 1110, in Weymouth, Dorset, England, at the age of 71.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Colswein of Lincoln родился около 1040 г. в местности браттлеби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thorold le Danois de Lincoln было 1 год, а матери, которую звали Edith Malet, -2. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Muriel de Chappell. Он умер февраль 1110 г. в местности вимоут, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
